name: Peoples Bank
description_short: Washington State community bank offering checking, savings, CDs, credit cards, home and business loans with 100+ years of operating history.
description_long:
Peoples Bank is a community bank operating in Washington State with over 100 years of banking history. The bank serves both personal and business customers through multiple physical branch locations including Fairhaven, Mount Vernon, Ballard, and Bellingham.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, Certificates of Deposit (CDs), credit cards, home loans, and home equity loans. For business customers, they provide business checking, business loans, business credit cards, merchant services (Merchant IQ), and remote deposit capture capabilities. They also offer investment services through Peoples Investments and provide credit monitoring tools integrated with their online banking platform.

Peoples Bank distinguishes itself through emphasis on customer service quality, with multiple customer testimonials highlighting staff helpfulness and a "family feel" at branches. They offer specialized products like Teen Access Checking and Youth Savings accounts designed for younger customers. The bank actively promotes community engagement through Impact Grants and maintains accessibility features on their website (AudioEye enabled). Current CD rates advertised at 3.40% APY for 7 and 15-month terms with $1,000 minimum deposit.

As a regional community bank, Peoples Bank operates with traditional branch-based service model rather than purely digital banking. Their product offerings are standard for regional banks and may not be as competitive on rates or fees compared to national banks or online-only institutions. The referral program (up to $500 annually in Visa Virtual Rewards) and credit insights tool add value but are increasingly common industry features. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with terms from 6 months to 5 years
Business loans and lines of credit
Online and mobile banking with credit insights tool
pros: Over 100 years of operating history and established community presence
Current CD rates of 3.40% APY for 7 and 15-month terms
Teen Access Checking and Youth Savings accounts specifically designed for younger savers
Free credit insights tool integrated with online banking (credit score, reports, monitoring, alerts)
Multiple branch locations throughout Washington State with emphasis on customer service
Comprehensive business banking services including merchant processing and remote deposit capture
Referral program offering up to $500 annually in Visa Virtual Rewards
cons: Requires active Peoples Bank checking account to open CD special offer accounts
CD specials require $1,000 minimum deposit and are not available for online account openings
Limited to Washington State geographic footprint with no indication of expanded service areas
No mention of mobile banking app features or digital-only account opening capabilities
Investment services mentioned but details are minimal and truncated on website
best_for: Washington State residents seeking community bank relationship with local branch access
Families wanting to establish teen and youth banking accounts with financial education
Small business owners needing integrated checking, lending, and merchant services
Customers prioritizing personal service relationships over digital-only banking
diagnosis: Peoples Bank is best for Washington State residents and small business owners seeking traditional community banking with emphasis on personal relationships and local branch service. The main caveat is geographic limitation to Washington State and reliance on physical branch infrastructure, which may be less convenient for customers preferring purely digital banking or those outside the service area.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
